description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to any branch, on every pull request to any branch, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has two jobs: build and upstream-dev. The build job runs on a matrix of Python versions 3.6, 3.7, 3.8 and OS ubuntu-latest, checking out the code, caching conda packages, setting up a miniconda environment, installing dependencies, running tests with pytest and coverage, and uploading coverage to Codecov. The upstream-dev job runs on ubuntu-latest, checking out the code, caching conda packages, setting up a miniconda environment, installing dependencies, and running tests with pytest.
